nasb.text: Prepare yourselves by your fathers’ households in your divisions, according to the writing of David king of Israel and according to the writing of his son Solomon.

esv.text: Prepare yourselves according to your fathers’ houses by your divisions, as prescribed in the writing of David king of Israel and the document of Solomon his son.

cnv.text: 你們要按著家族和照著班次，根據以色列王大衛所寫的和他兒子所羅門所寫的，自己好好預備。

ccb.text: 你们要按宗族和班次，依照以色列王大卫和他儿子所罗门所写的指示，预备自己。
